scope.summary: Normalizes only exact mtls: SHA-256 operator subjects at config load so accepted uppercase and bare-hex spellings become the runtime principal key, with C3 proving every accepted spelling authorizes.
out_of_scope: Remote control-listener or live Oracle R1 execution.
Normalization of non-mTLS operator identity kinds or malformed mTLS entries; those remain trim-only.

entry_points.name: control-listener operator authority policy
entry_points.trace: scripts/resource_budget.sh --profile test --run-id b1a-c3-adoption-lavendertern -- cargo test -p oraclemcp-core c3_operator_allowed_subjects_authorize_in_every_accepted_spelling: 1 passed; C3 loads each accepted spelling through OracleMcpConfig and verifies it authorizes the runtime mtls:sha256 lowercase principal key.

entry_points.name: HTTP config loading and validation
entry_points.trace: scripts/resource_budget.sh --profile test --run-id b15-config-adoption-lavendertern -- cargo test -p oraclemcp-config: 132 unit, 5 discovery-parity, 1 example-config, and 5 property tests passed.

limitations: No R1 remote control-listener or live Oracle execution is claimed; the closure is backed by deterministic config and C3 authority-policy tests.
The full workspace quality gate was not run for this source commit.
